transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Vanakkam, naan Priya, Supreme Petrochemicals Chennai-il irundhu pesaren. Ungalukku oru nimisham nerum unda?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Sollunga, naan Karthik, Velocity Inks-il procurement-pathi paarkkiren

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Nandri Karthik. Neenga indha neram epdi chemicals vaangureenga?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Toluene, ethyl acetate, mathiri solvents. Maasam-ku 6 tonne

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ippo irukkura supplier-oda pricing or delivery-l prachana iruka?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Price kashta-irukku. Niraya delays. Naanga immediately maatha thedaren

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Nanga 4 mani neram-ku ulla quote anuppuvom. Email kudunga?
